summary: Excellent early‑70s soundboard capture highlighted by an unforgettable China Cat Sunflower → The Other One sequence.
review: All three reviewers rave about the pristine audio quality, noting it rivals modern releases despite being from the early ’70s. The performance shines especially during the China Cat Sunflower > The Other One transition, which is described as “unbelievable.” Overall the recording is praised as one of the best from that era.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently high praise for both musical performance and audio fidelity across three detailed reviews; strong show quality plus excellent soundboard recording.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crystal‑clear early‑70s tape capture; reviewers say it sounds as good as modern releases with no noted flaws.

standout_songs: China Cat Sunflower > The Other One
show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers highlight the seamless flow of the set, especially praising the China Cat Sunflower → The Other One transition as a high‑point.
